meanings.definition: Trees with smooth bark, usually white or silver, commonly found in colder regions.
examples: Tall birches lined the path through the forest.
The wind moved gently through the birch trees.
Artists often paint snowy landscapes filled with birches.
Sunlight filtered between the silver birches beautifully.

meanings.definition: To punish someone by hitting them with birch sticks or branches.
examples: In earlier times, students were sometimes birched for disobedience.
The cruel official threatened to birch the prisoners.
Historical records describe children being birched at school.
Such harsh punishments are no longer accepted in many places.

meanings.definition: Spreading over a large area in an irregular or untidy way.
examples: They lived in a sprawling city filled with traffic and noise.
A sprawling mansion stood at the end of the road.
The village slowly grew into a sprawling town.
Tourists explored the sprawling gardens around the palace.

meanings.definition: Stretching or lying awkwardly with arms and legs spread out.
examples: The tired dog was sprawling across the floor.
Children sprawled on the grass after the game.
He had sprawled comfortably on the sofa with a book.
The climber fell sprawling onto the muddy ground.

meanings.definition: Expanding over a wide area without careful planning.
examples: The city is sprawling rapidly toward the countryside.
Factories sprawled across the outskirts of the town.
Modern suburbs are sprawling farther every year.
Roads and buildings had sprawled across the valley.

meanings.definition: Rising, flowing upward, or filling gradually, especially with liquid or emotion.
examples: Tears were welling in her eyes during the farewell.
Water welled from the cracked ground after the rain.
A feeling of pride welled up inside him.
Anger was welling beneath his calm expression.

meanings.definition: Increasing or growing strongly inside someone.
examples: Excitement was welling among the crowd before the concert.
Hope welled up after hearing the good news.
Fear began welling inside the travelers during the storm.
Memories welled up as she revisited her childhood home.
